mapper.sql: INNER JOIN ( SELECT f.order_uuid, COUNT(*) AS unassigned_roll_count, COALESCE(SUM(COALESCE(f.remaining_weight, f.actual_weight, 0)), 0) AS unassigned_weight FROM biz_finish_roll f WHERE f.is_deleted = 0 AND f.finish_status IN (2, 3) AND f.warehouse_uuid IS NULL GROUP BY f.order_uuid ) u ON u.order_uuid = o.uuid

o.is_deleted = 0 AND o.order_status IN (4, 5)
AND (o.order_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{q.keyword}, '%') OR o.customer_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{q.keyword}, '%'))
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM biz_process_order o
WHERE

SELECT o.uuid AS orderUuid, o.order_no AS orderNo, o.order_date AS orderDate, o.order_status AS orderStatus, o.customer_uuid AS customerUuid, o.customer_name AS customerName, u.unassigned_roll_count AS unassignedRollCount, u.unassigned_weight AS unassignedWeight, CASE WHEN COALESCE(k.finish_warehouse_count, 0) > 1 OR (o.warehouse_uuid IS NOT NULL AND k.finish_warehouse_uuid IS NOT NULL AND o.warehouse_uuid != k.finish_warehouse_uuid) THEN NULL ELSE COALESCE(o.warehouse_uuid, k.finish_warehouse_uuid) END AS knownWarehouseUuid, w.warehouse_name AS knownWarehouseName, CASE WHEN COALESCE(k.finish_warehouse_count, 0) > 1 OR (o.warehouse_uuid IS NOT NULL AND k.finish_warehouse_uuid IS NOT NULL AND o.warehouse_uuid != k.finish_warehouse_uuid) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS warehouseConflict, COALESCE(l.active_lock_count, 0) AS activeLockCount FROM biz_process_order o
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT f.order_uuid, COUNT(DISTINCT f.warehouse_uuid) AS finish_warehouse_count, MIN(f.warehouse_uuid) AS finish_warehouse_uuid FROM biz_finish_roll f WHERE f.is_deleted = 0 AND f.finish_status IN (2, 3) AND f.warehouse_uuid IS NOT NULL GROUP BY f.order_uuid ) k ON k.order_uuid = o.uuid LEFT JOIN sys_warehouse w ON w.uuid = COALESCE(o.warehouse_uuid, k.finish_warehouse_uuid) AND w.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN ( SELECT f.order_uuid, COUNT(DISTINCT dd.uuid) AS active_lock_count FROM biz_finish_roll f INNER JOIN biz_delivery_detail dd ON dd.finish_uuid = f.uuid AND dd.stock_lock_status = 1 AND dd.is_deleted = 0 WHERE f.is_deleted = 0 AND f.finish_status IN (2, 3) AND f.warehouse_uuid IS NULL GROUP BY f.order_uuid ) l ON l.order_uuid = o.uuid WHERE ORDER BY o.order_date DESC, o.order_no DESC, o.uuid ASC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT dd.uuid) FROM biz_delivery_detail dd WHERE dd.is_deleted = 0 AND dd.stock_lock_status = 1 AND dd.finish_uuid IN
#{uuid}
mapper.update:
UPDATE biz_finish_roll SET warehouse_uuid = #{warehouseUuid}, update_by = #{operator}, update_time = NOW(), version = version + 1 WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND warehouse_uuid IS NULL AND finish_status IN (2, 3) AND uuid IN
#{uuid}

UPDATE biz_process_order SET warehouse_uuid = #{warehouseUuid}, snap_finish = #{snapFinish}, update_by = #{operator}, update_time = NOW(), version = version + 1 WHERE uuid = #{orderUuid} AND is_deleted = 0 AND order_status IN (4, 5) AND (warehouse_uuid IS NULL OR warehouse_uuid = #{warehouseUuid})
